ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-23-1994 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGINS, BARBARA DBA ATHLON SPORTS MANAGEMENT

HAVING CONSIDERED PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL LETTER OF 1/19/94 AND THE MATTER HAVING BEEN REVIEWED THE COURT FINDS: PURSUANT TO 708.200 THE EXAMINEE MAY SEEK A PROTECTIVE ORDER. THE COURT DEEMS DISCUSSION BETWEEN THE PARTIES AND COURT REGARDING MR. JOSE OKENDO'S ADDRESS AND SIMILAR CLIENTS TO BE A REQUEST FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER. THE COURT REQUESTS THAT MS. HIGGINS PROVIDE THE COURT ONLY A COPY OF THE CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT(S) TO SUBSTANTIATE SUCH CLAIM. UPON IN CAMERA CONSIDERATION AND REVIEW, THE COURT WILL MAKE A DECISION AS TO WHETHER THE INFORMATION PLAINTIFF SEEKS IS ENTITLED TO A PROTECTIVE ORDER OR NOT. MS. HIGGINS IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH THE INFORMATION NO LATER THAN 20 DAYS FROM DATE OF THIS ORDER. IF THIS ORDER IS NOT COMPLIED WITH MS. HIGGINS IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE THE INFORMATION RELATING TO MR. OKENDO TO THE PLAINTIFF.
